title: ActiveFence | Automated Ted Teaming
description: ActiveFence Automated Red Teaming simulates real-world attacks on GenAI models across text, image, audio, and video. By using real-world scenarios, threat intelligence, and novel attacks developed by ActiveFence researchers, it uncovers hidden vulnerabilities before misuse occurs.

items: Agent Penetration Testing, Adversarial red-teaming: goal drift, prompt injection, hallucination chaining, & over-permissioned tool usage.
Multi-agent scenario simulations for collusion, misalignment, or deception detection.
Validate agent decisions against expected goal plans.
Sandboxed testing of all tool calls, code execution, cloud API triggers
